tion in fife. He will have financial

round things will improve substantially. The uncle (exalted Mercury in 4th to
Saturn) will help the native to grow rich. He will own conveyances and
houses. As the Sun and Venus have exchanged places, the Sun gets the contact
ofJupiter. The native will, therefore, have very bright period from his 36th
year onwards. He will acquire higher educational qualifications leading to his
elevation to a high position.
CHART477
In this chart as Venus, representative of wife, has the Moon in the 12th,
with none in the 2nd house Cancer owned by the Moon, an enemy, the partner
of the native will have some mental troubles. Further, Mars contacting Jupiter
